description_long: This armchair features a high, winged backrest with a gently curved silhouette and prominent side wings, providing a sense of enclosure and comfort. The upholstery is a solid, dark color, likely black, with subtle tufting details visible on the backrest. The rear of the chair displays a large, colorful logo and text, suggesting it may be customized for a business or promotional use. The armrests are thick, padded, and smoothly integrated into the chair's overall form, offering ample support. The legs are slender, slightly tapered, and appear to be made of metal, each painted in different colors for a distinctive look. The seat is deep and plush, indicating a soft and comfortable sitting experience.
description: A high-backed, winged armchair with dark upholstery, colorful metal legs, and a large logo on the back. The design is plush and supportive, with thick armrests and a deep seat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high, winged backrest, thick padded armrests, and deep seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved profile, thick armrest, and the colored metal leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large, colorful logo and text on the backrest, as well as the colored legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth armrest curve and colored leg, with part of the logo visible.
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged with subtle tufting
attribute_leg_type: slender, slightly tapered metal legs in various colors
